Complete full plan: game formats, club system, analytics, shop, and missions

  Bomb Pot indicator

- Hand Export: PDF \(jsPDF\) and JSON with blockchain verification proof
- Club Alliances & Leagues: schema, API, full Leagues page with standings

  endpoints, online users endpoint
- Tournament API: create, list, register with buy-in deduction and prize pool

EOF
\)")

Add MTT tournament engine, admin dashboard, security hardening, and engine fixes
